channel.title: main on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in main on William Fang

item.title: SnailCore: 开发实例
item.description: 项目结构 . ├── CMakeLists.txt └── main.cpp 0 directories, 2 files CMakeLists.txt ######################################################## snail_add_bin(test main.cpp) snail_bin_dep(test util shell) main.cpp #include <shell/main.hpp> #include <util/calendar.hpp> #include <util/log.hpp> using namespace snail; using namespace std; class playground_t: public snail::Main { public: using base_t = snail::Main; using base_t::base_t; playground_t() {}; ~playground_t() {}; const char* name() const override { return "playground_t"; }; bool do_init() override; void run() override; }; bool
